response.original_title: La corrida de toros del 3 de marzo de 1912
response.overview: Last night, the audience at the cinemas operated by the Cinema Theater Company was pleasantly surprised with the screening of a splendid film of the bullfight that took place yesterday afternoon. It is gratifying to note this record set by the Cinema Theater Company, showing a film four hours after the event. This is true proof of the company's commitment to serving its patrons, effectively aided by its photographer, Mr. Jorge Goitizolo, who filmed the movie.
response.title: La corrida de toros del 3 de marzo de 1912
